VAL-CFG-001.details: TestLLMSettingsDefaults: all 6 tests passed — provider='auto', base URLs None, API keys None, default models correct, temperature=0.3, no ValidationError

VAL-CFG-003.details: TestInvalidProvider: 4 parametrized tests passed — groq, invalid, azure, empty string all raise ValidationError

VAL-CFG-005.details: TestBaseURLEnvBinding: 3 tests passed — OPENAI_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, OPENROUTER_BASE_URL each bind to their respective field

VAL-CFG-007.details: TestTemperatureCoercion: 2 tests passed — LLM_TEMPERATURE string '0.7' coerces to float 0.7, '0' coerces to 0.0

VAL-CFG-008.details: TestTemperatureBoundaries: 2 tests passed — temperature=0.0 and temperature=1.0 both accepted

VAL-CFG-009.details: TestSettingsIntegration: 2 tests passed — Settings().llm is LLMSettings instance with provider='auto' and temperature=0.3

VAL-CFG-010.details: TestBackwardCompatibility: 2 tests passed — Settings() and LLMSettings() instantiate without new LLM_* env vars

VAL-CFG-011.details: TestBaseURLNonePreserved: 1 test passed — all base URLs are None (not empty string) when no env vars set

VAL-CFG-012.details: TestEmptyStringBaseURL: 3 tests passed — empty string env vars for OPENAI_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, OPENROUTER_BASE_URL all resolve to None
